title: senecio ambiguus
intro: Senecio ambiguus, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Groundsel can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
